commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a doctor session-store repair that detects providerless auto Codex overrides, sets `providerOverride` to `openai`, clears stale runtime/context fields, and adds regression tests.

PR surface: Source +41, Tests +74. Total +115 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. by source inspection: a providerless `modelOverride` with recovered auto fallback provenance and recovered auto auth provenance is treated as auto by current session/auth code, but PR head requires explicit `auto` source fields before scan/repair.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] A narrow automated repair can address the P2 legacy-provenance gap without changing the PR's doctor-boundary direction.

target.title: fix: repair providerless Codex session overrides
target.body:
## Summary

Supersedes #88745 and addresses the stale route shape behind #88710 without changing steady-state model-selection fallback behavior.

`resolveConfiguredProviderFallback` remains the implicit default-provider fallback only. The fix is in doctor session-route repair: providerless auto session overrides with legacy `openai-codex:*` auth provenance are repaired to canonical `openai` provider overrides, and stale runtime/context budget fields are cleared so the next run does not resolve `gpt-5.5` against an unrelated inferred provider such as `ollama`.

Contributor credit preserved via `Co-authored-by: Earl Vanze <earlvanze@gmail.com>`.

## Verification

- `pnpm test src/commands/doctor/shared/codex-route-warnings.test.ts src/agents/model-selection.test.ts`
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local` -> clean, no accepted/actionable findings
target.author: steipete
